description: Deterministic Mission context, Host-plan Waves, Mission-linked long-lived Agent Team, and member pressure state for visual-contract capture.
invariants: Mission stores full Markdown context and links one independent AgentTeam.
Waves store versioned Host plan and judgment; Wave 2 does not own the TeamRun.
The Mission-scoped TeamRun has agent_team_id and mission_id but no wave_id.
Four MemberRuns include running, reviewing, and blocked pressure states and remain eligible to carry forward.
Assignments use stable correlation ids and optional origin_wave_id provenance without a task graph.
The current TeamRun records execution root; member snapshots record actual cwd, Git identity, and discovered path roots only.
No durable thinking row exists; live preview must be injected after SSE connects.
